policy_start_date.title: Policy Start Date
policy_start_date.description: Date on which the policy coverage begins.

policy_holder_name.title: Policy Holder Name
policy_holder_name.description: Full legal name of the policy holder.

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Currency in which the premium and benefits are denominated.

policy_number.title: Policy Number
policy_number.description: Unique identifier assigned to this insurance policy.

policy_end_date.title: Policy End Date
policy_end_date.description: Date on which the policy coverage expires.

sum_assured.title: Sum Assured
sum_assured.description: Total amount guaranteed to be paid on death or maturity.

policy_term_years.title: Term (Years)
policy_term_years.description: Duration of the life insurance policy in years.

death_benefit.title: Death Benefit
death_benefit.description: Lump-sum amount paid to the beneficiary upon the insured's death.

surrender_value.title: Surrender Value
surrender_value.description: Cash value the policy holder receives upon early termination.

maturity_benefit.title: Maturity Benefit
maturity_benefit.description: Amount paid to the policy holder at the end of the policy term.

premium_frequency.title: Premium Frequency
premium_frequency.description: Frequency of premium payment (monthly, quarterly, annually).

full_name.title: Beneficiary Full Name
full_name.description: Full legal name of the individual beneficiary.

relationship_to_insured.title: Relationship to Insured
relationship_to_insured.description: Beneficiary's relationship to the policy holder.

percentage_share.title: Percentage Share (%)
percentage_share.description: Percentage of the benefit amount assigned to this beneficiary.

contact_email.title: Contact Email
contact_email.description: Contact email address of the beneficiary.

contact_phone.title: Contact Phone
contact_phone.description: Contact phone number of the beneficiary.

date_of_birth.title: Date of Birth
date_of_birth.description: Date of birth of the individual beneficiary.

verification_status.title: Verification Status
verification_status.description: Current verification status of the identity document (verified, pending, expired).

document_type_category.title: Document Category
document_type_category.description: Broad category of government-issued document (travel, driving, identity, civil).

visa_pages_remaining.title: Visa Pages Remaining
visa_pages_remaining.description: Number of blank visa pages remaining in the passport.

machine_readable_zone.title: Machine Readable Zone
machine_readable_zone.description: Two-line machine-readable zone (MRZ) string on the data page.

restrictions_code.title: Restrictions Code
restrictions_code.description: Coded restrictions on the driving privilege (e.g. corrective lenses required).

validity_duration_years.title: Duration (Years)
validity_duration_years.description: Number of years the national ID card is valid from the issue date.

registration_district.title: Registration District
registration_district.description: Administrative district where the birth was officially registered.

network_type.title: Network Type
network_type.description: Type of provider network (HMO, PPO, EPO, POS).

sum_insured.title: Sum Insured
sum_insured.description: Maximum amount covered for medical expenses per policy year.

deductible_amount.title: Deductible Amount
deductible_amount.description: Amount the insured must pay before insurance coverage begins.

pre_existing_conditions_covered.title: existing Conditions Covered
pre_existing_conditions_covered.description: Indicates whether pre-existing medical conditions are covered.

copay_percentage.title: pay Percentage
copay_percentage.description: Percentage of each medical bill paid by the insured.

waiting_period_days.title: Period (Days)
waiting_period_days.description: Number of days before certain coverages take effect.

property_address.title: Property Address
property_address.description: Full address of the insured property.

building_value.title: Building Value
building_value.description: Replacement value of the building structure.

contents_value.title: Contents Value
contents_value.description: Value of contents and personal belongings covered.

flood_zone.title: Flood Zone
flood_zone.description: Official flood zone designation for the property location.

location_risk_grade.title: Location Risk Grade
location_risk_grade.description: Risk classification of the property location (A–E).

vehicle_model.title: Vehicle Model
vehicle_model.description: Model name of the insured vehicle.

vehicle_year.title: Vehicle Year
vehicle_year.description: Year of manufacture of the insured vehicle.

liability_limit.title: Liability Limit
liability_limit.description: Maximum amount covered for third-party liability claims.

collision_deductible.title: Collision Deductible
collision_deductible.description: Amount the insured pays out-of-pocket for collision claims.

vehicle_registration.title: Vehicle Registration
vehicle_registration.description: Official registration number of the insured vehicle.
